description_long: This chair features a modern, minimalist design with a contoured black seat and backrest, both bordered by a wood-textured shell. The seat and backrest are ergonomically curved for comfort, with the backrest attached to the seat by a visible black metal support. Four tapered wooden legs provide stability, each reinforced by black metal crossbars for added structural integrity. The chair's materials combine a smooth, matte black surface with a natural wood grain finish, giving it a sophisticated yet functional appearance. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, suitable for urban environments such as cafes, offices, or waiting areas.
description: A modern chair with a curved black seat and backrest framed by wood, supported by four tapered wooden legs and black metal crossbars. Its sleek, ergonomic design blends matte black and wood grain finishes.
description_view_0: Front view shows the curved black seat and backrest framed by wood, with all four tapered legs visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the ergonomic curve of the seat and backrest, as well as the black metal support and crossbars.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the wood-textured backrest and the central black metal support, with the crossbars connecting the legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the seat's curvature, backrest attachment, and structural crossbars.
